title: ExHopper
body:
# ExHopper
![Sort example.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hxr9eIAQ/images/7d65c3e74fd0288c13c5cfc091ca71b677dd6913.gif)
## Commands
/exh give 'nickname' sorthopper

/exh give 'nickname' trashhopper

/exh reload
## Features
The plugin provides the ability to sort items using an inclusive and exclusive filter.

And then there's the trash can...
## Config
![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49b5851205ad935223d2a5334dafbab4682ea561.png)
